action_set_definitions.name: get_robot_fleet_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current list of all AMRs, their unique IDs, functional status, current power levels, and current coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: get_map_topology
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the warehouse map, including named waypoints like Logistics_Choke_Point, Global_Export_Bay, Staging_Area_South, and Buffer_Zone, along with their coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: get_distance
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the Euclidean distance in meters between two entities. Entities can be a robot ID or a named waypoint.

entity_a.description: ID of the first robot or name of the first waypoint.

entity_b.description: ID of the second robot or name of the second waypoint.

action_set_definitions.name: assign_task_to_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Formalizes the assignment of a payload task to a specific AMR.

task_id.description: The ID of the task payload (e.g., TASK_EXP_AC_90).

action_set_definitions.name: move_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a specific robot to move to a destination waypoint.

robot_id.description: The ID of the robot to move.

state_description.robots: A list of robots currently active in the warehouse.
state_description.tasks: A list of all tasks within the system.
state_description.warehouse_map: A mapping of locations to their topological connections or coordinates.
state_description.simulation_time: The total elapsed time steps in the simulation.

warehouse_map.topology_constraints: All traffic from Hazmat_Rack_Alpha and Hazmat_Rack_Beta to Global_Export_Bay must pass through Logistics_Choke_Point. Width constraint: 3.5m.
